articles.title: SPEND $1 TODAY, SAVE UP TO $2K ON YOUR NEXT VACATION
articles.summary: Ready to save up to $2,000 on every vacation for life? Dollar Flight Club has your back—TRY THE CLUB FOR JUST $1 IF YOU SIGN UP IN THE NEXT 12 HOURS [4]. That means; Hawaii from $174, Iceland from $215, or Greece from $245 round trip. Join over 1 million members saving on travel this year.

articles.title: OPEN RELEASE OF GROK-1
articles.summary: xAI has released the weights and architecture of its 314 billion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model, Grok-1. It is written in JAX and uses a modern Transformer architecture with GeGLU, ROPE, sandwich Norm, and other niceties.

articles.title: DID OPENAI JUST ACCIDENTALLY LEAK THE NEXT BIG CHATGPT UPGRADE?
articles.summary: OpenAI appears to have accidentally published a blog post that was indexed by Bing and DuckDuckGo before it was quickly taken down. The post was an announcement for GPT-4.5 Turbo, a new model that surpasses GPT-4 Turbo in speed, accuracy, and scalability. The cached description mentions a knowledge cutoff date of June 2024 and a 256k context window. OpenAI has not commented on the leak.

articles.title: INTRODUCING CLAUDE 3 HAIKU
articles.summary: Anthropic's Claude 3 Haiku is its fastest and most cost-effective AI model. It features advanced vision capabilities and excels in benchmarks. Claude 3 Haiku is designed for enterprises, with a focus on speed and affordability.

articles.title: WHAT I LEARNED LOOKING AT 900 MOST POPULAR OPEN SOURCE AI TOOLS
articles.summary: We can find some interesting trends by looking at GitHub stars for popular AI models. Most open-source AI tooling seems to be focused on infrastructure and applications.

articles.title: CAPPY: OUTPERFORMING AND BOOSTING LARGE MULTI-TASK LANGUAGE MODELS WITH A SMALL SCORER
articles.summary: Cappy is a small model trained to take instructions and a candidate completion and return a score for how well the completion fulfills the instructions. It outperforms much larger models at this task, suggesting it may be used as a feedback mechanism for training and generation.

articles.title: 3D HUMAN POSE RECONSTRUCTION WITH DIFFUSION MODELS
articles.summary: ScoreHMR introduces a novel method for 3D human pose and shape reconstruction by leveraging the power of diffusion models. This approach, which bypasses traditional optimization techniques, uses score guidance to align a human body model with image observations.

articles.title: TLM
articles.summary: Local CLI Copilot powered by CodeLLaMa.

articles.title: MULTI-NODE LLM TRAINING ON AMD GPUS
articles.summary: This blog post outlines the tech stack that Lamini uses to train models on AMD GPUs, which includes schedulers, model training tech, and more.

articles.title: LLM INFERENCE SPEED OF LIGHT
articles.summary: Exploring the "speed of light" theoretical limit for transformer-based language model inference, this article highlights the importance of memory bandwidth over computational power, demonstrating that inference speed is primarily constrained by the ability to read data from memory rather than perform calculations, a key factor for optimizing and understanding AI performance.

articles.title: AI IS BAD/GOOD ACTUALLY
articles.summary: The author of this article proposes differentiating AI discussions by using terms like "harmful," "helpful," "capable," and "incapable" rather than the vague good/bad spectrum. They personally view AI as capable but potentially harmful due to unresolved issues such as copyright infringement and bias exaggeration. The author invites readers to clarify their own positions on AI using these more specific terms.

articles.title: MY KIDS WILL FANCY GENERATIVE AI, I CHOOSE TO FIGHT IT
articles.summary: This article reflects on the historical pattern of technological innovations impacting jobs, with the rise of AI being the latest example. It compares past shifts, like the advent of writing, printing, and typewriters, to the current AI revolution, pondering whether AI will ultimately enhance or diminish human creativity. The author calls for resistance and adaptation to preserve the uniquely human element in creative endeavors amidst the growing influence of AI-generated content.

articles.title: KITOPS: A STANDARDS-BASED PACKAGE FOR AI/ML MODELS
articles.summary: Kit is an open source MLOps project that packages your model, datasets, code, and configuration so data scientists and developers

articles.title: can work together. Download the Kit CLI
MUSICLANG
articles.summary: Music Lang is an API and set of models that generate music.

articles.title: OPTIMIZING TECHNICAL DOCS FOR LLMS
articles.summary: kapa.ai offers insights on structuring documentation for LLMs, advocating for clear hierarchy, segmentation by sub-products, inclusion of troubleshooting FAQs, self-contained code snippets, and the establishment of community forums.

articles.title: EARNINGS CALLS Q/A DATASET (HUGGINGFACE HUB)
articles.summary: A dataset of curated Question and Answer pairs transcribed from earnings calls.
